conservative.name: Steely Gaze
conservative.requirements: You must be within close range of an able to make eye contact with the target

success.description: The target must move away from you with its next action. If appropriate, you influence the target

boon.description: The target suffers the Rattled condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: Add to the next Charm or Guile check attempted by a member of your party during this encounter

reckless.name: Steely Gaze
reckless.requirements: You must be within close range of and able to make eye contact with the target

success.description: The target must move away from you with its next action. If appropriate, you influence the target

boon.description: The target suffers the Cowed condition for 2 rounds

bane.description: Add to the next Charm or Guile check attempted by a member of your party during this encounter
